ARS.name: Arsenal
ARS.note: WC26 heat-map: 11 confirmed reps — Saliba (FRA CB), Hincapié (ECU CB · #5), Gabriel Magalhães (BRA CB), Saka (ENG winger), Ødegaard (NOR captain), Eze (ENG · joined 25/26 from CRY), Martinelli (BRA · BRA bench), Trossard (BEL), Havertz (GER · 2 goals v CUW), Rice (ENG), Gyökeres (SWE · joined 25/26). Jurriën Timber (NED) WITHDREW from WC26 with groin injury (doesn't add to load). Gabriel Jesus (BRA) status TBC due to injury concerns. 11 reps = 2nd heaviest in PL behind MCI (17) — Arteta opener prep significantly compounded by WC fatigue across spine of team. 0.85× discount appropriate (down from 1.0×).

AVL.name: Aston Villa
AVL.note: WC26 heat-map: 7-9 confirmed reps — Lindelöf (SWE C · starts v TUN tonight · from MUN Sep 2025), Konsa (ENG · plays Wed v CRO), McGinn (SCO · played 83min v HAI), Emiliano Martínez (ARG #1 GK · plays Tue v ALG), Watkins (ENG FW · plays Wed v CRO), Tielemans (BEL CM · plays Mon v EGY), Pau Torres (ESP CB · plays Mon v CPV). Possible additional: Maatsen (NED), Kamara (FRA), Buendía (ARG). Bailey (JAM) and Cash (POL) — nations didn't qualify. Onana (CMR) — also didn't qualify. Emery continuity but 7+ confirmed WC reps = 0.9× discount appropriate (down from 1.0×).

BOU.name: Bournemouth
BOU.note: Manager change: Iraola → Marco Rose. Tactical reset · 0.8× discount until pre-season friendlies confirm system. BOU finished 6th in 25/26 (best-ever · first European qualification) — adds fixture load. WC26 reps: 5 confirmed — Tyler Adams (USA CDM · 90min v PAR + yellow), Ben Gannon Doak (SCO RW · £25m Aug 2025 · 75min v HAI), Ryan Christie (SCO MID · 3-yr ext Jun 13 · 15min v HAI), Rayan Vitor (BRA FWD · #37 from Vasco · BRA bench v MOR unused), Bafodé Diakité (CIV CB · BOU #18 prev Lille · CIV bench v ECU tonight). Heavy WC load + manager + European-cup fixture compound. 0.8× holds.

BRE.name: Brentford
BRE.note: WC26 reps: 2 confirmed starters from today/tonight — Igor Thiago (BRA FW #9 · starts v MOR Jun 13 in BRE shirt), Aaron Hickey (SCO RB #2 · starts v HAI tonight 21:00 EDT). Likely additional reps (in squad · WC selection probable): Sepp van den Berg (NED), Kevin Schade (GER), Dango Ouattara (CIV), Kristoffer Ajer (NOR), Mikkel Damsgaard (DEN). Caoimhin Kelleher (IRL) & Nathan Collins (IRL) — Ireland didn't qualify. If 4-5 likely confirm → BRE hits 6-7 WC reps · would justify 0.85× discount. Currently 0.95× holds (manager continuity assumed).

BHA.name: Brighton
BHA.note: WC26 heat-map: 6 confirmed reps: Diego Gómez (PAR MID · played v USA), Ferdi Kadıoğlu (TUR RB · played v AUS), Verbruggen (NED GK · played v JPN), van Hecke (NED CB · played v JPN), Wieffer (NED CDM · NED bench v JPN), Maxim De Cuyper (BEL LB · BEL bench v EGY tonight). Possible: Mitoma (JPN) — NOT in JPN XI v NED, may not be in 26-man squad. 0.9× discount maintained (Hürzeler continuity keeps system risk LOW).

CHE.name: Chelsea
CHE.manager: Xabi Alonso CONFIRMED (NEW · ex-Real Madrid · ex-Leverkusen)
CHE.note: Manager change: Maresca → Xabi Alonso CONFIRMED. 🚨 CUCURELLA SOLD TO REAL MADRID Jun 15 2026 (€55m + €5m add-ons · contract to 2032 · Mourinho's first signing). Updated WC26 reps: 7 (Cucurella OUT) — R.James (ENG), P.Neto (POR), Hato (NED), Enzo F. (ARG), Gusto (FRA), Caicedo (ECU), M.Sarr (SEN). Lavia DROPPED from BEL revised squad. CHE-owned loanees (Páez, Penders, Jackson) not counted for PL fatigue. Apply 0.85× discount until Alonso's system + first-XI confirmed in pre-season friendlies (slight relief vs 0.8× due to Cucurella's departure). Cole Palmer (no WC fatigue · TUCHEL SNUB) + Caicedo central to whatever Alonso builds — both rested-premium opener candidates.

COV.name: Coventry (Promoted)
COV.note: Promoted to PL 26/27 (1-1 v Blackburn confirmed promotion). WC26 reps: 2 confirmed — Haji Wright (USA FWD #19 · 20G in promotion campaign · on USA bench v PAR tonight), Brandon Thomas-Asante (GHA FWD · in Ghana 26-man squad). Promoted-club WC fatigue + system bedding-in risk → 0.85× discount.

CRY.name: Crystal Palace
CRY.manager: Pierre Sage (STRONG RUMOR · ex-Lens · in negotiations) · Glasner leaving
CRY.note: Manager change: Glasner confirmed leaving Palace. **Pierre Sage CONFIRMED as new HC since Tue Jun 11 · all docs in place** (Romano Jun 15). Sage's profile = vertical/transition football, similar to what made Lyon over-perform early 24/25. Combined with 10 WC reps (sole 4th-heaviest — entire CRY first XI in WC service) = max compound risk. Apply 0.85× — could drop to 0.8× if Sage's PL learning curve adds variance.

EVE.name: Everton
EVE.note: WC26 reps: 1 confirmed — Nathan Patterson (SCO RB · #2 at EVE · on bench v HAI tonight). Coleman + Gueye CONFIRMED leaving end of 25/26 — dropped EVE WC heat-map from 4 → 3 historically. Patterson the one current PL 26/27 WC active rep. 1.0× holds (continuity).

FUL.name: Fulham
FUL.manager: Álvaro Arbeloa (STRONG RUMOR · ex-Real Madrid youth · ex-Castilla coach · talks ongoing)
FUL.note: Manager change: Silva → Benfica CONFIRMED. Álvaro Arbeloa (43yo Spaniard · former Liverpool/Real Madrid player · Spain 2010 WC winner · RM Castilla coach until recently) in talks per Ornstein Jun 10. If confirmed: Spanish possession-school football · pragmatic defensive organization. 6 WC reps (Berge/Bobb NOR + Diop MAR + Castagne BEL + Robinson USA + Lukić BIH — Lukić confirmed 90min in BIH v CAN Jun 12 2026). Apply 0.8× until Arbeloa confirmed + system visible. Jiménez confirmed leaving · Wilson contract offer pending. Chukwueze (NGA didn't qualify) is rested-premium-adjacent if priced cheap.

HUL.name: Hull City (Promoted)
HUL.note: Heavy rotation tax — Jakirovic rotated Hughes, Giles, Slater between matches in Championship. Avoid as starters in opening 26/27 squad. WC26 reps: 2 confirmed — Liam Millar (CAN MID, 90min v BIH Jun 12), Amir Hadžiahmetović (BIH MID, in 26-man squad confirmed). Potential additional reps (in club squad but WC selection TBC): Mohamed Belloumi (ALG), Yū Hirakawa (JPN). If those land, HUL hits 3-4 WC reps — promoted-club heat-map risk meaningful. 0.8× discount holds (rotation tax + emerging WC fatigue both pull toward caution).

IPS.name: Ipswich (Promoted)
IPS.manager: TBD (Kieran McKenna STEPPED DOWN · taking time away from management · Jun 10, 2026 per Ornstein)
IPS.note: 🚨 MAJOR BLOW: McKenna stepped down a month after securing promotion · taking time away from management (Ornstein). IPS protected financially if/when McKenna returns. Contingency planning accelerates. Lost the 'cleanest opener target' status. WC26 reps: 1 confirmed — George Hirst (SCO FW · #9 at IPS · on bench v HAI tonight). 0.85× until replacement + system clarified in pre-season friendlies. Big risk for FPL opening 3 GWs.

LEE.name: Leeds
LEE.note: Leeds was promoted INTO 25/26 (not for 26/27) → continuity PL club for 26/27 (2nd season back). Manager continuity. GK: Karl Darlow was #1 for most of 25/26 → likely stays #1 for 26/27. Meslier (backup) CONFIRMED LEAVING end of 25/26 (contract expired). 4 WC reps (Gudmundsson SWE, Tanaka JPN, Aaronson USA, Okafor SUI — £18m from Milan Aug 2025, 8G in first LEE season). Darlow as nailed-ish #1 GK is potential budget FPL gem (£4-4.5m). If Okafor becomes WC story → £25m+ summer suitors signal.

LIV.name: Liverpool
LIV.note: MAJOR REGIME CHANGE CONFIRMED: Slot departed despite winning 25/26 PL title (Arsenal won, not LIV). Andoni Iraola officially announced (ex-BOU). Iraola's profile = high-press · vertical · transition football — fits Kerkez attacking-WB role, Isak's mobility, Wirtz as #10 in transition. But: Iraola has never managed at top-6 level. Combined with 8 WC reps (Wirtz/Alisson/van Dijk/Gravenberch/Gakpo/Mac Allister/Isak/Endō) + 5 gold-pick departures CONFIRMED (TAA, Salah, Robbo, Konaté, Quansah-already gone) = HIGH-VARIANCE. Salah's exit confirms the full rebuild — front-3 has to be rebuilt entirely. Apply 0.8× until system + first-XI confirmed in pre-season friendlies.

MCI.name: Man City
MCI.manager: Maresca (STRONG RUMOR · ex-CHE) · Pep gone · Hugo Viana DoF
MCI.note: Major rebuild: Pep + Bernardo + KDB + Walker + Grealish + Stones (CONFIRMED leaving) all gone. Hugo Viana (ex-Sporting Portugal DoF · joined MCI ~1 year ago) driving the rebuild — close friend of Amorim from Sporting days but Amorim NOT going to MCI · Maresca remains the strongest rumor for the manager seat. 17 WC reps (SOLE HEAVIEST · Doku BEL revised IN + Khusanov + Semenyo + Stones-departure). Apply 0.8× discount. Haaland's auto-default captain status broken. Academy: Mukasa (back at MCI · contract to 2030).

MUN.name: Man Utd
MUN.note: Carrick rebuild + Casemiro CONFIRMED leaving (destination TBD) + Rashford RETURNING from Barcelona loan. 12 WC reps (Mainoo, Rashford, Bruno F., Dalot, Cunha, L.Martínez, Mazraoui, Lammens, Ugarte, Bayindir, Amad, T.Fletcher) = sole 3rd-heaviest behind MCI 17/ARS 15. RB hierarchy under Carrick: Dalot > Mazraoui. 🆕 RESTED PREMIUM: Mbeumo (CMR didn't qualify) = full pre-season rest, zero WC fatigue — likely Carrick's preferred wide attacker. Apply 0.85× cluster but Mbeumo himself is exempt.

NEW.name: Newcastle
NEW.note: Heavy squad churn for 26/27: 8+ confirmed outgoings (Gordon → Barcelona, Krafth + Trippier + Targett + Ruddy + Thompson released, Ramsdale loan-return, Hernes → Groningen). GK position partially resolved: Ewen Jaouen (young French GK from Reims · long-term contract) signed — likely Pope still #1, Jaouen development backup. 7 WC reps (Livramento, Burn, Thiaw, Woltemade, Bruno G., Elanga, Wissa COD). Apply 0.85× until incomings clarify.

NFO.name: Nott'm Forest
NFO.manager: Vítor Pereira (continuity · in role since ~Feb 2026 · half-season pedigree)
NFO.note: Vítor Pereira (Portuguese · ex-FC Porto · ex-Wolves) has been Forest manager since ~Feb 2026. Half-season already played under him → continuity for 26/27 (Nuno Espírito Santo left mid-25/26, now at WHU Championship). 4 WC reps confirmed: E.Anderson (ENG), Ndoye (SUI · played QAT v SUI), Sangaré (CIV · bench v ECU), Chris Wood (NZL · starts v IRN Mon). Gunn SCO RELEASED (only 1 sub app entire 25/26). Sels remains nailed #1 GK + rested-premium gold pick. Boly leaving CB depth. NFO opener prep manageable · Sels gold-pick status stays.

SUN.name: Sunderland
SUN.note: SUN was in PL 25/26 (not promoted · clarified Jun 2026). Per official club news Jun 2026: 9 WC reps across 4 continents (Diarra SEN, Xhaka SUI captain, Brobbey + Roefs NED, Alderete PAR, Talbi MAR, Isidor HAI, Angulo ECU, Sadiki COD). Loanees Masuaku (Lens) + Adingra (Monaco) NOT counted unless return. 4th-heaviest tied with CHE/AVL. Apply 0.9× — no longer a 'clean continuity' target.

TOT.name: Tottenham
TOT.manager: Roberto De Zerbi (3-4 games in) · IF SURVIVES
TOT.note: WC26 heat-map: 9-11 confirmed reps — Porro (POR RB · new 5-yr ext until 2031 · plays Wed v COD), van de Ven (NED CB · played 90min v JPN), Bergvall (SWE MID · starts v TUN tonight), Romero (ARG CB · plays Tue v ALG), Kudus (GHA · plays Wed v PAN), Bentancur (URU CM · plays Mon v KSA), Sarr (SEN MID · plays Tue v FRA), Danso (AUT CB · plays Wed v JOR), Palhinha (POR CDM · likely on bench v COD Wed), Robertson (SCO LB · from LIV free · played 90min v HAI), possibly Kulusevski (SWE) on TUN bench. Frank under pressure for opener · 9+ reps + multiple deep-run nations (POR/ARG/NED/FRA) = heavy WC fatigue. 0.85× discount appropriate (down from 1.0×).

WHU.name: West Ham 🔻
WHU.manager: Nuno Espírito Santo (ex-NFO · joined for Championship 26/27)
WHU.note: 26/27 status: West Ham in Championship after relegation. Nuno Espírito Santo joins as manager (left NFO mid-25/26 cycle? — actually left NFO end of 25/26 for Championship rebuild). Veteran arrivals: Trippier (ex-NEW), Jiménez (ex-FUL, return), Adama Traoré + Fabiański leaving. PL-clause exits expected (Bowen?). WHU non-PL — off FPL planning beyond tracking PL-bound poaches.
